languages.text:
Манипулус Эоганн Фебрус — генетор экстремис, достигший небывалых высот в искусстве аугментации. Обладатель острого и беспокойного ума, он проводит время в экспериментах, денно и нощно пытаясь отыскать способ продлить функционирование человеческого тела — чего бы это ни стоило. На этом пути Эоганна неразлучно сопровождает сервочереп по имени Нунциус, с которым тот общается, словно с живым человеком.
Эоганн не боится ходить по грани дозволенного, проявляя живой интерес к ксенотехнологиям. Но какова цена прикосновения к запретному и чем можно пожертвовать ради достижения цели?

Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. Possessed of a keen and restless intellect, he spends his time in experimentation, labouring day and night to discover a means of prolonging the functioning of the human body, regardless of the cost. On this path, Eogunn is inseparable from a servo-skull companion named Nuncius, with whom he speaks as if it were a living person. Eogunn does not fear to push the limits of what is permitted, displaying a keen interest in xenos technology. But what is the price of touching the forbidden, and what may he sacrifice in pursuit of his goal?
languages.original_text:
Манипулус Эоганн Фебрус — генетор экстремис, достигший небывалых высот в искусстве аугментации. traits.locale_text: "Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. Possessed of a keen and restless intellect, he spends his time in experimentation, labouring day and night to discover a means of prolonging the functioning of the human body, regardless of the cost. On this path, Eogunn is inseparably accompanied by a servo-skull named Nuntius, with whom he speaks as though to a living person. Eogunn does not fear to tread the edge of the permitted, displaying a keen interest in xenos technology. But what is the price of touching the forbidden, and what may one sacrifice in pursuit of the goal?"

languages.text: El manipulus Eogunn Februs es un genetor extremis que ha alcanzado cotas sin precedentes en el arte de los aumentos. Está dotado de una mente inquieta y privilegiada y se pasa el día experimentando, trabajando sin cesar para descubrir alguna forma de prolongar el funcionamiento del cuerpo humano a cualquier precio. Su compañero, el servocráneo Nuncius, no se separa de él en esta empresa. Eogunn lo trata como si fuera una persona viva. No teme transgredir los límites de lo permitido y demuestra un vivo interés por la tecnología xenos, pero ¿qué precio tiene tocar lo prohibido? ¿Y qué está dispuesto a sacrificar para alcanzar sus metas?
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. languages.text: “操纵者伊奥贡·费布鲁斯是一位特级基因士，在植入物技术领域达到了前所未有的高度。他拥有敏锐而永不停歇的头脑，将时间都投入到实验之中，日夜不息地寻找延长人体机能的方法，不计任何代价。在这条路上，伊奥贡与一颗名叫努恩修斯的伺服头骨伙伴形影不离，并像对待活人一样与它交流。伊奥贡从不畏惧突破禁忌界限，对异形科技也流露出浓厚的兴趣。然而，触碰禁忌的代价是什么？为了追逐目标，他又会牺牲什么呢？”
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. Possessed of a keen and restless intellect, he spends his time in experimentation, labouring day and night to discover a means of prolonging the functioning of the human body, regardless of the cost. On this path, Eogunn is inseparable from a servo-skull companion named Nuncius, with whom he speaks as if it were a living person. Eogunn does not fear to push the limits of what is permitted, displaying a keen interest in xenos technology. But what is the price of touching the forbidden, and what may he sacrifice in pursuit of his goal?

traits.locale_text: “操纵者伊奥贡·费布鲁斯是一位特级基因士，在植入物技术领域达到了前所未有的高度。他拥有敏锐而永不停歇的头脑，将时间都投入到实验之中，日夜不息地寻找延长人体机能的方法，不计任何代价。在这条路上，伊奥贡与一颗名叫努恩修斯的伺服头骨伙伴形影不离，并像对待活人一样与它交流。伊奥贡从不畏惧突破禁忌界限，对异形科技也流露出浓厚的兴趣。然而，触碰禁忌的代价是什么？为了追逐目标，他又会牺牲什么呢？”

languages.text: « Le manipulus Eogunn Februs est un genetor extremis qui a atteint des sommets inégalés dans l'art des augmentations. Doté d'un esprit vif et d'une intelligence rare, il consacre le plus clair de son temps à ses expériences, travaillant jour et nuit afin de découvrir un moyen de prolonger la durée de vie du corps humain, quel qu'en soit le coût. Dans cette perspective, Eogunn ne se sépare jamais de son compagnon servocrâne, Nuncius, avec lequel il discute comme s'il s'agissait d'un individu à part entière. Eogunn n'a pas peur de repousser les limites de ce qui est autorisé et manifeste un intérêt certain pour la technologie xénos. Mais quel est le prix à payer quand on touche à l'interdit, et qu'est-il prêt à sacrifier pour arriver à ses fins ? »
languages.original_text: "Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. languages.text: Manipülus Eogunn Februs, ogmentasyon sanatında eşi benzeri görülmemiş zirvelere ulaşmış bir Genetör Extremis'tir. Keskin ve huzursuz bir zekâya sahip olan Eogunn; zamanını deneylerle geçirmekte, bedeli ne olursa olsun insan bedeninin işleyişini uzatmanın bir yolunu bulmak için gece gündüz çalışmakta. Bu yolda Eogunn, sanki yaşayan bir insanmış gibi konuştuğu Nuncius adındaki hizmelet yoldaşından asla ayrılmaz. Eogunn, izin verilenin sınırlarını zorlamaktan korkmaz ve zeno teknolojisine yoğun bir ilgi duyar. Peki yasak olana dokunmanın bedeli nedir ve hedefine ulaşmak için nelerden fedakârlık edebilir?

languages.text: マニピュルス・エオガン・フェブラスは、増強の技において前例なき高みに達したゲネター・エクストレミスである。鋭く、休むことを知らぬ知性の持ち主であり、その時間を実験に費やし、代償をいとわず人体の機能を延ばす手段を見出さんと、日夜励んでいる。この道において、エオガンはヌンキウスと名づけられたサーヴォスカルの相棒と片時も離れず、まるで生きた人間であるかのように彼に語りかける。エオガンは許されたものの限界を押し広げることを恐れず、異種族の技術に並々ならぬ関心を示す。だが、禁断のものに触れる代償とは何か、そして彼は自らの目的を追い求めるために、何を犠牲にするのか？
languages.original_text: Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation. Possessed of a keen and restless intellect, he spends his time in experimentation, labouring day and night to discover a means of prolonging the functioning of the human body, regardless of the cost. languages.text: "Manipulus Eogunn Februs ist ein Genetor Extremis mit einer beispiellosen Expertise in der Kunst der Augmentation. Besessen von einem scharfen und ruhelosen Verstand, verbringt er seine Zeit mit Experimenten und arbeitet Tag und Nacht, um mit allen Mitteln einen Weg zu finden, die Funktionstüchtigkeit des menschlichen Körpers zu verlängern. Auf diesem Pfad ist Eogunn untrennbar mit einem Servoschädel namens Nuncius verbunden, mit dem er spricht, als wäre er eine lebendige Person. Eogunn scheut sich nicht, die Grenzen des Erlaubten zu verschieben und hat ein reges Interesse an Xenos-Technologien. Aber was ist der Preis für die verbotenen Früchte, und was wird er opfern, um sein Ziel zu erreichen?"
languages.original_text: "Manipulus Eogunn Februs is a Genetor Extremis who has attained unprecedented heights in the art of augmentation.
